message:
feat(engine): parser arena VariableDeclaration support + test config updates

Parser infrastructure:
- parser_arena.rs: Add ArenaVariableDeclarator struct and VariableDeclaration
  arena node type with materialization and audit descriptor support. This
  extends the AST arena allocation pipeline to handle variable declarations
  (let/const/var), a prerequisite for the world-class-parser initiative.
- parser_multi_engine_harness.rs: Add new parser multi-engine test entries
- parser_phase0_metamorphic.rs: 3 new metamorphic test cases
- parser_property_regression.rs: 1 new property regression test case

Test configuration updates:
- hybrid_lane_router.rs: Increase risk threshold from 5M to 50M millionths,
  add risk_budget struct with tail_latency, compatibility_error, and
  regret budgets for more realistic test scenarios
- privacy_learning_contract_integration.rs: Change ClippingMethod from
  L2Norm to PerCoordinate in valid_clipping strategy, use explicit key
  initialization [43u8; 32] instead of duplicate function call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
